data.title: Trump: Iran talks "may" take place in Pakistan within the next two days
data.description: US President Trump told the New York Post that negotiations on Iran "may" be held in Pakistan "within the next two days," adding that the US "prefers" holding the negotiations in Pakistan. (Jinshi)

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Launches Audit Subsidy Program to Enhance Ecosystem Security
data.description:
The Ethereum Foundation has announced the launch of the 'Ethereum Audit Subsidy Program' on the X platform, aimed at providing financial support for security audits to developers. According to Odaily, this initiative is part of the EF's 'Trillion Dollar Security Initiative' and involves collaboration with several auditing and infrastructure organizations, including Nethermind, Chainlink Labs, and Areta, to evaluate and review project applications.

The Ethereum Foundation highlighted that while security audits are considered best practices in the industry, they often come with high costs. This program seeks to lower the entry barriers for developers, thereby supporting more innovative use cases and projects within the Ethereum ecosystem.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Loss Levels Highlight Market Trends
data.description: Glassnode has reported on the current state of relative unrealized losses in the cryptocurrency market. According to Foresight News, this metric measures the total unrealized losses as a percentage of market capitalization, indicating the depth of 'paper losses' among holders. As of now, Solana (SOL) stands at 54.8%, Bitcoin (BTC) at 11.9%, and Ethereum (ETH) at 16.6%. The elevated loss levels in altcoins suggest significant holdings at market peaks, with supply concentrated among buyers who entered near cycle highs.

data.title: U.S. Enforces Blockade on Iranian Ports
data.description: More than 10,000 U.S. personnel are currently enforcing a blockade on vessels entering and exiting Iranian ports, according to U.S. Central Command. In the first 24 hours, no vessels breached the blockade. Additionally, six merchant ships complied with U.S. military instructions.

data.title: France Lowers 2026 Economic Growth Forecast to 0.9%
data.description: France has revised its economic growth forecast for 2026, reducing it to 0.9%, according to a report by Agence France-Presse. This adjustment reflects a more cautious outlook for the country's economic performance in the coming years. The decision to lower the growth expectation comes amid various economic challenges and uncertainties that France is currently facing. The revised forecast indicates a need for strategic adjustments to address potential economic hurdles and ensure sustainable growth.

data.title: The Ethereum Foundation launches an audit subsidy program to reduce security costs for developers.
data.description: The Ethereum Foundation (ETH Zurich) announced the "Ethereum Audit Subsidy Program" on the X platform, partnering with multiple auditing and infrastructure organizations to provide subsidies for security audit fees for developers, aiming to improve the overall security of the ecosystem. Led by EF's "Trillion Dollar Security Initiative" and in collaboration with Nethermind, Chainlink Labs, and Areta, the program evaluates and reviews applications. The ETH Zurich stated that while security audits are industry best practices, they are costly; this initiative aims to lower the development barrier and support more innovative use cases and projects in the Ethereum ecosystem.

data.title: FluidStack Seeks $1 Billion Funding at $18 Billion Valuation
data.description: AI cloud platform FluidStack is reportedly aiming to raise approximately $1 billion at a valuation of $18 billion. According to Odaily, sources indicate that Leopold Aschenbrenner's firm, Situational Awareness, is in discussions to participate and co-lead the investment round. The funds are expected to accelerate FluidStack's expansion in AI computing and cloud infrastructure. FluidStack has previously established partnerships with several Bitcoin mining companies, including TeraWulf, Cipher Mining, and Hut 8.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Stocks CRCL and COIN Experience Significant Gains
data.description: Cryptocurrency-related stocks CRCL and COIN have seen notable increases in their market value. According to Foresight News, CRCL's stock price rose by 12.74%, reaching $108.5, while COIN experienced a 6.64% increase, with its current price at $185.81.

data.title: Morpho Introduces Fixed-Rate Lending Product Morpho Midnight
data.description: Morpho has unveiled its new fixed-rate lending product, Morpho Midnight, as part of its DeFi offerings. According to NS3.AI, the protocol currently holds approximately $7.7 billion in total value locked. Paul Frambot, a representative of Morpho, stated that Midnight is distinct from Morpho Blue, with further details anticipated upon the completion of security audits.

data.title: Russia's Retail Crypto Framework Targets 2026 Implementation with Investor Limits
data.description:
Russia is planning to implement a retail cryptocurrency framework by July 1, 2026, which aims to regulate crypto purchases for non-qualified investors. According to NS3.AI, the draft legislation proposes a limit of 300,000 rubles per year for these investors. A survey conducted by Vyberu.ru, as reported by RBC, indicates that 36% of investment-focused Russians are willing to invest in bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies once a clear legal framework is established.

The proposed framework would require trading to occur through licensed intermediaries, effectively banning cash-to-crypto conversions. Additionally, the draft maintains the prohibition of using cryptocurrencies for domestic payments. This move is part of Russia's broader effort to regulate the cryptocurrency market and provide a structured environment for investors.

data.title: Bitcoin Rebound Boosts Strategy's Holdings to Profitability
data.description: Strategy's Bitcoin holdings have returned to profitability as the market value of its treasury reached $59.1 billion. According to NS3.AI, the recent rebound in Bitcoin prices has pushed the value of Strategy's 780,897 Bitcoin holdings above the company's cost basis.

data.title: US Treasury Secretary Bessant: The Federal Reserve can observe the situation for a period of time before cutting interest rates.
data.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessant stated that the Federal Reserve could observe the situation for a period before cutting interest rates, emphasizing that a rate cut is indeed necessary. The Fed should wait until Warsh is in place before taking action, and he is quite confident that core inflation will continue to decline. Bessant also noted that the 10% tariff stipulated in Section 122 has already been implemented, and President Trump has not yet decided to raise the rate to 15%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Goldman Sachs submits application for Bitcoin Premium Income ETF
data.description: According to market sources, Goldman Sachs has submitted an application for a Bitcoin Premium Income ETF.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Seeks Approval for Bitcoin Premium Income ETF
data.description: Goldman Sachs has filed an application for a Bitcoin Premium Income Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF), according to BWEnews. This move marks the financial giant's latest effort to expand its offerings in the cryptocurrency sector. The proposed ETF aims to provide investors with exposure to Bitcoin while generating income through a premium strategy. This filing comes amid growing interest in cryptocurrency investment products and follows similar initiatives by other financial institutions. The approval of such an ETF could potentially broaden the accessibility of Bitcoin investments to a wider range of investors.

data.title: Deutsche Bank Predicts Decline in U.S. Dollar Amid Easing Iran Conflict Risks
data.description: Deutsche Bank has forecasted a potential weakening of the U.S. dollar as risks associated with the ongoing conflict in Iran begin to diminish. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the bank's analysis that suggests investors might consider positioning themselves for a softer dollar. The easing tensions in the region are expected to influence currency markets, providing an opportunity for strategic financial moves. Deutsche Bank's insights come amid broader geopolitical developments that could impact global economic dynamics.

data.title: A whale holding approximately 1,031 BTC short positions is nearing liquidation risk and has already accumulated unrealized losses of approximately $42.39 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchian monitoring, Bitcoin briefly broke through the $76,000 mark. On-chain data shows that the whale that previously "sold 255 BTC short" currently holds approximately 1,031 BTC (about $78 million) in short positions, with a liquidation price of $76,420.83, which is approaching the risk zone. This address currently has a cumulative floating loss of approximately $42.39 million on Hyperliquid. If Bitcoin rises further, it may trigger forced liquidation, amplifying market volatility.

data.title: Hassett: The Fed still has room to cut interest rates
data.description: White House National Economic Council Director Hassett stated that the Federal Reserve still has room to cut interest rates, and the upward trend in oil prices will reverse. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. White House Economic Adviser: Fed Has Room for Rate Cuts
data.description: The U.S. White House National Economic Council Director, Kevin Hassett, has stated that the Federal Reserve still has room to cut interest rates. According to Jin10, Hassett's comments come amid ongoing discussions about the U.S. economic outlook and monetary policy adjustments. The potential for rate cuts is being considered as part of efforts to sustain economic growth and address any emerging challenges in the financial markets. Hassett's remarks highlight the flexibility of the Federal Reserve in managing interest rates to support the economy.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Nvidia Unveils Open-Source AI Model to Advance Quantum Computing
data.description: Nvidia has introduced an open-source AI model named Ising, aimed at accelerating the development of practical quantum computers. According to Foresight News, the Ising model offers superior AI-based quantum processor calibration capabilities globally. It also boasts quantum error correction decoding abilities that are up to 2.5 times faster and three times more accurate than traditional methods. Nvidia's CEO, Jensen Huang, emphasized the critical role of AI in making quantum computing practical.

data.title: Strategy's perpetual preferred stock (STRC) saw a single-day trading volume of $1.1 billion, continuously providing a funding engine for BTC accumulation.
data.description: On April 13th, Strategy, a Bitcoin treasury firm, recorded approximately $1.1 billion in trading volume for its perpetual preferred stock, STRC, a nearly 47% increase from the previous record. This has become a core financing tool for the company to accelerate its Bitcoin accumulation. Strategy raises funds through the sale of STRC and other preferred stocks, using the proceeds for high-frequency Bitcoin purchases. Data shows that Strategy recently purchased 13,927 BTC for approximately $1 billion, bringing its total holdings to 780,897 BTC. The funds primarily came from the issuance of over 10 million STRC shares. In its overall capital plan, STRC, along with STRK, STRF, STRD, and common stock financing, constitutes its "42/42" financing framework, aiming to raise $84 billion by 2027 for continued Bitcoin purchases. Current market opinion suggests that STRC is gradually becoming the dominant tool in this financing system. (The Block)
